# ARM Vectorization Intrinsics Manual

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_arm_intrinsics_manual.py. Do not edit manually. -->

一个面向 `apply-vectorization` 的 ARM 向量化 quick-reference 手册，覆盖 `NEON`、`SVE`、`SME`，以及当前向量化相关的 `SVE2`、`SME2` 常用条目。

## What This Manual Does

1. **Quick Reference by ISA**: 直接给出各 ISA 的常用向量化条目和代码模式
2. **Correctness Checklist**: 汇总 `validate-snippet` 的静态规则
3. **Official Source Mapping**: 保留官方来源和 feature gate 信息
4. **Code Generation Support**: 为 `apply-vectorization` 提供可直接查阅的 load/store/arithmetic/ZA inline asm 模式

## Key Features

- **46 条 curated 记录**：仅保留与向量化直接相关的常用条目
- **7 条 NEON 记录**：固定宽度主体循环、广播、加法、FMA
- **10 条 SVE / SVE2 记录**：长度无关、谓词、predicated load/store、dot-product
- **19 条 SME / SME2 记录**：streaming、ZA ownership、ZA 初始化、inline asm 外积与写回
- **10 条规则**：供 `validate-snippet` 和人工检查共同复用

## Directory Structure

```text
arm-intrinsics-manual/
├── README.md
├── neon.md
├── sve.md
├── sme.md
└── correctness-rules.md
```

## Usage Examples

### Query an Intrinsic

```bash
python3 ../scripts/query_arm_intrinsics.py lookup --name vld1q_f32
```

### Query an Instruction Family

```bash
python3 ../scripts/query_arm_intrinsics.py lookup --instruction FMOPA --isa sme
```

### Validate a Candidate Snippet

```bash
python3 ../scripts/query_arm_intrinsics.py validate-snippet --file ./candidate.c --isa sve --json
```

## Page Overview

| Page | Focus | Coverage |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [NEON](./neon.md) | 主向量循环 + 标量尾处理 | 7 条记录 |
| [SVE / SVE2](./sve.md) | 长度无关循环 + 谓词化访存 | 10 条记录 |
| [SME / SME2](./sme.md) | streaming / ZA ownership / tile-slice | 19 条记录 |
| [Correctness Rules](./correctness-rules.md) | 静态规则与失败模式 | 10 条规则 |

## How It Works

1. `refresh_arm_intrinsics_db.py` 抓取官方 `ACLE` 和 `Neon Intrinsics Reference`，并对 `developer.arm.com` SME 指令页做可选抓取 / reference-only 记录
2. 结构化快照写入 `references/arm_intrinsics_db/`
3. `generate_arm_intrinsics_manual.py` 将快照生成为 quick-reference 手册
4. `query_arm_intrinsics.py` 与 `validate-snippet` 直接消费同一份快照

## Data Source

- `retrieved_at`: `2026-05-12`
- `schema_version`: `1.0.0`

- [Arm C Language Extensions](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/main/acle.html): html-scraped / 2026-05-12
- [Arm Neon Intrinsics Reference](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/neon_intrinsics/advsimd.html): html-scraped / 2026-05-12
- [Arm SIMD: Optimize, Migrate, and Accelerate C/C++ for Peak Performance](https://developer.arm.com/servers-and-cloud-computing/arm-simd): reference-only / 2026-05-12
- [Scalable Matrix Extension: Expanding the Arm Intrinsics Search Engine](https://developer.arm.com/community/arm-community-blogs/b/architectures-and-processors-blog/posts/scalable-matrix-extension-expanding-the-arm-intrinsics-search-engine): reference-only / 2026-05-12
- [Part 1: Arm Scalable Matrix Extension (SME) Introduction](https://developer.arm.com/community/arm-community-blogs/b/architectures-and-processors-blog/posts/arm-scalable-matrix-extension-introduction): optional-html; reference-only when developer.arm.com returns 403 / 2026-05-12
- [Part 2: Arm Scalable Matrix Extension (SME) Instructions](https://developer.arm.com/community/arm-community-blogs/b/architectures-and-processors-blog/posts/arm-scalable-matrix-extension-introduction-p2): optional-html; reference-only when developer.arm.com returns 403 / 2026-05-12
- [Arm A-profile A64 Instruction Set Architecture / SME Instructions](https://developer.arm.com/documentation/ddi0602/latest/SME-Instructions): reference-only; direct scripted access can return 403 / 2026-05-12
- [Arm A-profile A64 Instruction Set Architecture / SVE Instructions](https://developer.arm.com/documentation/ddi0602/latest/SVE-Instructions): reference-only; direct scripted access can return 403 / 2026-05-12

## Requirements

- Python 3 用于查询与生成脚本
- `refresh_arm_intrinsics_db.py` 需要 `requests` 和 `beautifulsoup4`
- `query_arm_intrinsics.py` 和生成后的手册在运行时不依赖网络
